news.headline: SEC files lawsuit against Cumberland for allegedly selling securities, including Solana and Polygon. Sues firm again.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) intensified its enforcement actions in the cryptocurrency space by filing charges against Cumberland. The agency reiterated its stance on classifying assets like Solana as securities. This latest move adds to the growing number of regulatory actions taken by the SEC in the crypto industry. This development comes as part of the SEC's ongoing efforts to regulate digital assets and protect investors in this rapidly evolving market.

news.headline: New dating app Laguna uses AI to predict relationship success, addressing common user frustrations.
news.summary: In New York on October 10, 2024, Laguna, an AI-powered matchmaking app, is revolutionizing online dating by addressing common user frustrations. The app blends sophisticated psychology research with state-of-the-art technology to provide a unique experience. This development signifies a significant advancement in the online dating realm, with Laguna offering a solution to longstanding challenges faced by users.

news.headline: Alchemy Pay adds Samsung Pay integration to Crypto Virtual Card, enhancing user experience.
news.summary: Alchemy Pay, a prominent fiat-to-crypto payment gateway based in Singapore, revealed a recent update to its Virtual Card service on October 10, 2024. The update includes integration with Samsung Pay on one of its virtual cards, enhancing the experience for users. This development expands the capabilities of Alchemy Pay's Virtual Card holders, providing them with quick and convenient access to their funds.

news.headline: Lummus Technology named Licensor of the Year for portfolio expansion, technology leadership.
news.summary: Lummus Technology, a worldwide provider of process technologies and energy solutions, was recently honored for its portfolio growth, technological leadership, and significant impact on the industry by a prominent industry media organization. The awards were presented on October 10, 2024, in Houston. This recognition underscores Lummus's commitment to innovation and successful expansion strategies. The company's influence and achievements were acknowledged through the reception of two prestigious awards, highlighting its pioneering approach and industry contributions.

news.headline: Vast reveals final Haven-1 space station design in Long Beach, showcasing cutting-edge features for global collaboration in low-Earth orbit.
news.summary: Vast, a US space habitation technology company, has revealed the interior design of Haven-1, the world's first commercial space station located in low-Earth orbit (LEO). The station offers advanced facilities for scientific research, technological advancement, and global collaboration. This groundbreaking initiative marks a significant step towards long-term living and working in space.

news.headline: Orange announces successful consent solicitation on outstanding notes, with significant participation from bondholders.
US 30 Yr Auction

Subaru reveals pricing for 2025 Crosstrek, offering Premium with 2.5-liter engine, Wilderness model with 9.3" ground clearance, 3,500-lb towing capacity, and 11.6" Multimedia Plus system.SharedPointer Driver Assist.
news.summary: The Crosstrek Premium now includes a standard 2.5-liter, 182-hp SUBARU BOXER® engine. The rugged Crosstrek Wilderness model has returned with enhancements such as upgraded suspension, 9.3-inch ground clearance, and an increased towing capacity of 3,500 lbs. It offers the SUBARU STARLINK® 11.6-inch Multimedia Plus system. Additionally, the Subaru EyeSight® Driver Assist system has been upgraded.

news.headline: Westat awarded contract to conduct MEPS-HC for AHRQ, supporting goal to improve healthcare. AHRQ based in Rockville, Md.
news.summary: Westat is proud to announce its ongoing collaboration with AHRQ in leading the MEPS-HC, a crucial aspect of AHRQ's goal to generate healthcare evidence for enhanced safety, quality, accessibility, equity, and affordability. The partnership will continue in ROCKVILLE, Md., as of October 10, 2024. This initiative exemplifies Westat and AHRQ's commitment to fostering improvements in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: 12 local organizations to get $900,000 in grants for environmental projects. PG&E supports climate action with key investments.
news.summary: PG&E and The PG&E Corporation Foundation are providing grants to support climate action initiatives in local communities. This program is aiming to address the impacts of wildfires, unseasonable heat in the western region, and destructive hurricanes in the southeastern area. The grants are part of a commitment to combat the challenges posed by climate change. The initiative, based in Oakland, California, was launched on October 10, 2024. This effort is crucial in dealing with the increasing climate-related incidents and ensuring the resilience of communities.

news.headline: Las Vegas Sands & HACU select 13 scholarship recipients for hospitality students in Las Vegas and Dallas-Fort Worth.
news.summary: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE: LVS) has collaborated with HACU to introduce the Sands Hospitality Advancement Scholarships for hospitality students at Hispanic-serving institutions in Las Vegas and the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area. The initiative, announced on October 10, 2024, aims to support the education of students in the hospitality sector. The scholarships are part of the company's commitment to the community and will benefit a significant number of students pursuing careers in hospitality in these regions. The partnership underscores the importance of investing in the next generation of industry professionals.

news.headline: Community Gaming partners with Moonton for Mobile Legends: Bang Bang esports. CG organizers gain access to exclusive MLBB benefits like Tournament Mode and economic incentives.
news.summary: The esports platform Community Gaming has introduced new features for tournament organizers, offering exclusive benefits for Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) competitions. These perks include the highly desired Tournament Mode and economic incentives. This update was announced on October 10, 2024 in New York, showcasing CG's commitment to enhancing the esports experience. Organizers now have access to specialized tools to elevate their events, attracting more participants and enhancing the overall gaming ecosystem. This move represents CG's dedication to supporting the growth of esports and fostering a competitive yet rewarding environment.

news.headline: Jeep® and Mopar's program awards scholarships to Native American students Carl Cuthair and Camron Slaton, up to $20,000.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on October 10, 2024, it was announced that two Native American students were awarded scholarships. Carl Cuthair from San Juan College in Farmington, New Mexico, and Camron Slaton from Oklahoma State University Institute of Technology in Okmulgee, Oklahoma, were recipients. Both students were granted scholarships worth up to $20,000 in total.

news.headline: FDA approves iota Biosciences' bladder device study by Astellas Pharma's subsidiary; First-in-Human Early Feasibility Study.
news.summary: Today, in Alameda, California, iota Biosciences, Inc., a subsidiary of Astellas Pharma Inc. (TSE: 4503) disclosed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has given the approval for its Investigational Device. The President and CEO of Astellas, Naoki Okamura, expressed the company's excitement about this development.

news.headline: NBA stars Keegan and Kris Murray partner with Brightn for youth mental health, introducing AI journaling feature on World Mental Health Day.
news.summary: A collaboration was inaugurated on World Mental Health Day, debuting an innovative AI-assisted journaling capability. Brightn, a leading AI-based mental health technology provider, revealed the partnership in Cedar Rapids, Iowa on October 10, 2024. This new feature aims to enhance mental well-being through advanced technology.

news.headline: US 30-Year Bond Bid-to-Cover Actual 2.500 (Forecast -, Previous 2.380)
Leipurin, a subsidiary of Aspo Plc, completes the divestment of its Russian operations on October 10, 2024.
news.summary: As of October 10, 2024, at 8:00 pm, Aspo Plc announced that its subsidiary, Leipurin, has successfully concluded the sale of its operations in Russia. This strategic move involves a significant divestment from the company's portfolio.

news.headline: Cyrq Energy appoints Mark Sudbey as CEO, replacing Chip Schneider. Sudbey previously managed $2 billion annual revenue at Alpha Generation.
news.summary: Today, Cyrq Energy has appointed Mark Sudbey as its new Chief Executive Officer (CEO). Sudbey, a seasoned industry executive, previously led Alpha Generation and oversaw a domestic power portfolio generating almost $2 billion in annual revenue. Chip Schneider, who served as interim CEO, will resume his position as Chief Financial Officer and take on the role of President at Cyrq. Sudbey's extensive experience in managing energy infrastructure companies makes him a valuable addition to the leadership team at Cyrq.

news.headline: US 30-Year Bond High Yield Actual 4.389% (Forecast -, Previous 4.015%)
Tips to prevent cold and flu during season - even mild sniffles can disrupt daily life. Stay vigilant against germs.
news.summary: In Mission, Kansas on October 10, 2024, a press release highlighted by PRNewswire emphasized the ease with which cold and flu symptoms can disrupt daily routines. The article discusses how even a minor case of the sniffles can significantly impact one's ability to manage daily responsibilities. While it is challenging to completely evade germs, there are strategies to cope with cold and flu symptoms effectively.

news.headline: Origin Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: OBK) plans to release Q3 2024 results on 10/23/24 after market close and hold conference call on 10/24/24 at 8:00am CT.
news.summary: RUSTON, Louisiana - Origin Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: OBK), the parent company of Origin Bank, is set to release its third quarter 2024 financial results on October 23, 2024, after the market closes. A conference call to discuss the results will take place on October 24, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET). The call will be led by Drake Mills, Chairman, President, and CEO of Origin, William J. Wallace, IV, CFO of Origin, and Lance Hall, President and CEO of Origin Bank.

news.headline: Treasury WI 30 Yr yield 4.404% before $22 billion auction.
Save A Lot introduces loyalty program 'Save A Lot Rewards' nationwide, offering points for shoppers to redeem for rewards.
news.summary: In St. Louis, Save A Lot, a major discount grocery chain, has launched its inaugural loyalty program, Save A Lot Rewards. Through a mobile app, customers can now earn points, referred to as "dots," that can be exchanged for rewards at Save A Lot stores. While individual Save A Lot Retail Partners will have the option to tailor the app to showcase local deals, the national loyalty program will grant shoppers dots for their purchases. This initiative showcases the company's commitment to enhancing customer loyalty and engagement through personalized rewards.

news.headline: Pacific Defense unveils 3U OpenVPX card with Silvus Technologies StreamCaster MN-MIMO MANET Radios, enhancing MANET capabilities through The Open Group Sensor Open Systems Architecture.
news.summary: California-based company Pacific Defense revealed the launch of the SX-620, a 3U OpenVPX™ plug-in card that integrates Mobile Ad Hoc Networking (MANET) capabilities using Silvus’ MN-MIMO waveform technology. This marks the first instance within the industry. The card is designed to align with The Open Group Sensor Open Systems Architecture™ (SOSA) Technical Standard and the C5ISR/EW Modular Open Suite of Standards (CMOSS) ecosystem. This release signifies a significant advancement in modular open systems approach (MOSA) products, enhancing mission solutions.

news.headline: Trump to say if elected he will formally notify Mexico and Canada of his plan to invoke six-year renegotiation provision of USMCA to address concerns about Chinese auto production
BIC America promotes Acoustech subwoofers SWA8, SWA120, SWA122 for impactful bass performance.
news.summary: Acoustech subwoofer line, which includes the SWA8, SWA120, and SWA122, is being highlighted by BIC America for home audio enthusiasts. The SWA8, SWA120, and SWA122 are known for delivering deep, powerful sound. This announcement was made in Irwindale, California on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: AECOM to support Southern Water's $4.8B program; chosen for various design services and partnerships.
news.summary: A major engineering company, AECOM (NYSE: ACM), has secured contracts worth a total of $4.8 billion to support Southern Water's capital delivery program. In collaboration with Pell Frischmann, AECOM was selected by contractor Kier to provide detailed design services for non-infrastructure water projects under Lot 1, and wastewater projects under Lot 2. This partnership falls within the Strategic Delivery Partner Framework and will be operational from 2025 to 2030, aiming to enhance water and wastewater infrastructure throughout the UK in the upcoming AMP8 regulatory period.Furthermore, AECOM has been appointed by another contractor, Morrison Water Services, as its exclusive design partner for the SDP Lot 3 Framework focusing on infrastructure projects. Additionally, AECOM will be responsible for the Wastewater Framework under the Low Complexity Delivery Route Lot 2. These frameworks have a duration of seven and five years, respectively, with opportunities for a five-year extension. AECOM's role will involve contributing to project design, management, and overall execution. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bostic: This choppiness to me is along the lines of maybe we should take a pause in November. I’m definitely open to that - WSJ.
Constant Contact acquires Txtify Technologies to boost growth for small businesses by improving lead generation and social media monetization.
news.summary: A recent agreement has bolstered a platform's abilities in generating leads and monetizing social media, particularly benefiting small businesses in converting followers to customers and speeding up their expansion. The deal was sealed between WALTHAM, Mass. and TORONTO on October 10, 2024. Constant Contact, specializing in digital marketing, has significantly enhanced their capabilities with this strategic move.

news.headline: Bostic: I’m open to not moving at one of the last two meetings if the data comes in as I expect - WSJ
Upcoming Tesla event ‘We, Robot’ will highlight 5 key topics for viewers.
Delegation explores Zhongshan enterprises with int'l media. CICG Academy leads the themed tour on Oct. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On October 9, 2024, a delegation comprising communication experts and foreign media representatives visited various businesses in Zhongshan. The visit was part of an event titled "The World Comes to Zhongshan," organized by the CICG Academy of Translation and Interpretation. The delegation included international experts and media outlets, highlighting the global interest in Zhongshan. The event showcased the city's thriving enterprises and their significance on the international stage.

news.headline: Global automotive fuel cell market expected to grow at 31.1% CAGR, reaching $8.6 billion by 2034. Key players include GM, Honda, Hyundai, with North America leading in 2024. Key findings: fuel stack segment leads, PEM fuel cells popular, hydrogen fuel type driving demand. Governments incentivizing zero-emission vehicles. Evolving technology improving durability, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness.
news.summary: The global automotive fuel cell industry was valued at US$420.0 million in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 31.1% to reach US$8.6 billion by 2034. The sector is witnessing substantial innovation and investment from public and private sectors to develop fuel cell infrastructure and vehicles. Key players in the market include Advent Technologies Holdings, Ballard Power Systems, and Honda Motors. The fuel cell stack segment is expected to lead the market, with hydrogen fuel cells driving demand. North America is predicted to lead in the global market in 2024. Government incentives and legislation promoting zero-emission vehicles are key factors fuelling market expansion. The focus on materials research, hydrogen storage, and fuel cell system integration is improving the durability, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness of fuel cells.

news.headline: US loyalty programs market growing at 11.8% CAGR, set to continue growth. Report includes 50+ KPIs on trends, retail dynamics, and more.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report titled "United States Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook" has been introduced by ResearchAndMarkets.com. This comprehensive study delves into over 50 key performance indicators (KPIs) regarding loyalty program trends in the U.S., covering various sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. From Q3 2024 update, it reveals that the loyalty market in the United States experienced a noteworthy Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.8% between 2019 and 2023. Projections indicate further growth in the loyalty market for the foreseeable future.

news.headline: Wall Street shies away from election bets as race remains too close to call.
Abstrakt Cloud Solutions and parent company Abstrakt Marketing Group appear on Inc. 5000 list: ACS at No. 1080, AMG at No. 3808.
news.summary: A recent report from Inc. disclosed that Abstrakt Cloud Solutions has secured the 1080th position on the prestigious 2024 Inc. 5000 list, which showcases the fastest-growing private companies in the United States. The parent company, Abstrakt Marketing Group, also made it to the list and secured the 3808th position. This recognition highlights the significant growth and success of both companies in the competitive market.

news.headline: Global coaching industry booming with a sharp rise from 2021 to 2024 per Coach Foundation's study in 250 countries.
news.summary: In Sharjah, UAE, as of October 10, 2024, a recent study by the Coach Foundation revealed a substantial increase in the global life coaching industry. This three-year research, which surveyed 250 countries, demonstrates a significant surge in the request for coaching services worldwide.

news.headline: Fed’s Bostic keeps door open to skipping rate cut in November - WSJ
Fed bids for 30 Yr bond total $301.9 mln.
Study by Brigham and Women’s Hospital finds Oura Ring most accurate sleep tracker among Fitbit Sense and Apple Watch.
news.summary: In San Francisco, ŌURA, known for the Oura Ring, a popular smart ring, revealed findings of a recent sleep accuracy study. The research was featured in Sensors journal and highlighted at Sleep Europe 2024, a prominent event for sleep medicine. Brigham and Women’s Hospital researchers assessed sleep-staging algorithms in various consumer wearables: Oura Ring, Fitbit Sense, and Apple Watch. The study aimed to determine the precision of these devices in tracking sleep patterns.

news.headline: NetSupport's classroom.cloud earns ISTE Seal for quality EdTech after 35 years of providing solutions.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company NetSupport, a leader in education technology solutions for more than 35 years, has been honored by ISTE (International Society for Technology in Education) for their platform, classroom.cloud. This classroom management tool has been awarded the prestigious ISTE Seal for quality education technology following a rigorous evaluation by a team of education and technology professionals. The recognition highlights the effectiveness of classroom.cloud as a comprehensive classroom management solution.

news.headline: Allegations state FBI breached MIT License using OpenZeppelin’s code, raising legal worries.
news.summary: There have been allegations against the FBI regarding the inappropriate utilization of OpenZeppelin’s libraries in its smart contracts, raising legal questions. The FBI is under scrutiny for potentially misusing OpenZeppelin's libraries in their smart contracts, which has raised concerns within the legal community.

news.headline: Ronin is enhancing security of its cross-chain bridge with Chainlink CCIP, freeing resources for faster adoption.
news.summary: Ronin announced that integrating Chainlink's CCIP would enhance security for its bridge and allow for the allocation of additional resources to expedite adoption.

news.headline: Analyst: Bitcoin needs to move beyond $60K range to attract investors and stimulate market activity.
news.summary: According to an analyst, the stagnation of Bitcoin at $60,000 is causing investors to remain on the sidelines. The analyst suggests that a new price range is necessary to stimulate activity in the market.

news.headline: Trading decrease at major crypto exchanges puzzles experts as Bitcoin soars. Geopolitical tensions may be causing it.
news.summary: There is confusion among experts regarding the concurrent decrease in trading activity and increase in Bitcoin prices. The reason behind this anomaly, which involves trading dropping by [specific number] while Bitcoin values surge, remains unclear. Speculation has arisen regarding whether geopolitical tensions could be a contributing factor to this trend.

news.headline: Bitcoin reacts to US CPI & jobs data; $60K price potentially affected as Fed faces challenging economic landscape.
news.summary: The current situation in the US economy has led to a potential advantage for Bitcoin, as macroeconomic indicators show a stark contrast. The Consumer Price Index (CPI) and jobless data are diverging, creating a challenging scenario for the Federal Reserve. This divergence could prove beneficial for Bitcoin, as investors seek alternative assets amidst economic uncertainty.

news.headline: 10 crypto theories as inaccurate as "Peter Todd is Satoshi" surfaced, highlighting recurring misguided notions in the industry.
news.summary: The recent claim that Peter Todd is Satoshi Nakamoto is just one among various misguided theories in the world of cryptocurrency. Over the years, there have been at least 10 other ideas that have been proven incorrect. These theories often gain traction before ultimately being debunked by evidence or lack thereof. This phenomenon highlights the speculative nature of the crypto space and the importance of verifying information before accepting it as fact. Such instances serve as a reminder that skepticism and critical thinking are essential when evaluating claims in the crypto community.

news.headline: Uniswap introduces Unichain, a layer-2 solution for faster, cheaper transactions with cross-chain compatibility.
news.summary: Uniswap has announced that it has developed a new app chain that boasts quicker and more cost-effective transactions. Additionally, this platform ensures seamless cross-chain interoperability. The app chain is expected to significantly reduce transaction times and costs compared to existing methods. This development reflects Uniswap's ongoing efforts to innovate and streamline blockchain technology.

news.headline: Investors choose crypto over fixed-income in ETF wishlist: Schwab survey results.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been indicated that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, with a total of 164,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter has reached 4.2%, showing a steady increase in economic productivity. These positive trends reflect a strong and stable economy that is continuing to show signs of growth and resilience. Overall, these numbers suggest a promising outlook for the future of the country's economic landscape.

news.headline: Ethel Kennedy, 96, known for her prominent political family, has passed away.
